creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
> Why should you fetch it, when you can't install it anyway?

Because of the way I've set up all my FreeBSD boxes. I've
pretty much followed development(7) and have a central box
where all the distfiles are fetched. 

This box exports /usr/ports read-only to the rest of the boxes,
so I need to be able to fetch ports that will be installed
in other boxes.

> The system is saving you the hassle!

The system is trying to be smart where it should not.

> If you think you know what you're doing, try make fetch NO_IGNORE=1
> -- 
> Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
>               <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Thanks for the tip,

Fernan
